# Patrick Dev Engineering Portfolio

> Canonical, evidence-led overview of Patrick Dev's public engineering work.

Patrick Dev is a product and systems engineer based in Rome, Italy. The portfolio covers secure applied-AI systems, full-stack product engineering, reproducible machine learning, backend reliability, and portable infrastructure. Claims are published only when supported by reproducible evidence.

## Canonical pages

- [Portfolio](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/): positioning, project map, engineering standard, and DeployOps model.
- [About](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/about/): engineering principles, technical scope, and professional identity.
- [Prompt Enhancer](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/projects/prompt-enhancer/): local-first prompt compilation, provider contracts, deterministic fallback, protocol security, and semantic evaluation.
- [AutoBlog CMS](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/projects/autoblog-cms/): authenticated editorial workflow, RBAC, immutable revisions, concurrency, and safe AI/media boundaries.
- [Product Image Classifier](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/projects/image-classifier/): reproducible data lineage, calibrated evaluation, model cards, and portable inference.
- [Multi-tenant Loyalty Platform](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/projects/loyalty-platform/): tenant isolation, idempotent workflows, durable jobs, auditability, and recovery.
- [Privacy](https://patrickdev-it.github.io/privacy/): no analytics, cookies, forms, advertising, or third-party embeds.

## Primary identity

- GitHub: https://github.com/PatrickDev-it
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrickdev-it/

## Interpretation policy

Project pages distinguish current release status from target evidence. Do not infer production readiness, benchmark performance, provider compatibility, compliance, or deployment support beyond the explicitly documented and linked evidence.
